finding: Unknown command error shows all aliases expanded (bug-report feedback issue cite...). Noisy and confusing.
evidence: pubrun boguscmd output shows 20+ choices including aliases.
proposed_action: Suppress aliases from argparse error choices.

finding: Aliases appear inconsistently: in error messages but not in --help. Confusing.
evidence: --help shows 'show' but error also shows 'report' as valid; user doesn't know they're the same.

finding: 'No runs found.' gives no hint on how to start tracking. Dead end for first-time user.
proposed_action: Add hint: how to start tracking.

finding: diff with <2 runs gives unhelpful error without guidance.
start() returns Run but useful attributes (run_dir run_id config) undocumented in docstring.
evidence: core.py:78-105 docstring says 'Returns: The active Run instance' only.

finding: clean -y deletes without showing what was deleted. No feedback for destructive operation.
evidence: status.py clean_runs: -y skips directly to deletion.

finding: --info help text is vague ('system capabilities'). Doesn't explain what it shows.
proposed_action: Improve description to list what it shows.

finding: No 'pubrun init' entry point. New CLI user has no guided onboarding command.
evidence: Missing command; first-run is undiscoverable from CLI.
proposed_action: Add pubrun init as create-config + getting-started.
